ogTitle: Marnoo West vs Maroona: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marnoo West and Maroona.
heading: Marnoo West vs Maroona — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marnoo West, Victoria and Maroona, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marnoo West has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Maroona (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marnoo West or Maroona safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marnoo West has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Maroona scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marnoo West scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Maroona scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marnoo West or Maroona?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marnoo West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
